title: fix(index): split INDEX.md into 4 focused sub-indexes to prevent LLM context overflow
body:
## Summary

- Rewrites `references/INDEX.md` from 459 lines (~12k tokens) to a 29-line master category guide
- Creates 4 focused sub-indexes, each under 150 lines:
  - `INDEX-vulns.md` (150L) — vulnerability types + secure patterns → load during **Phase 3**
  - `INDEX-defi.md` (97L) — DeFi protocols, tokens, invariants → load during **Phase 4**
  - `INDEX-tools.md` (80L) — tools, detection patterns, PoC templates → load during **Phase 2**
  - `INDEX-advanced.md` (141L) — L2/AA/ZK/staking + quick lookup table
- Updates `SKILL.md` Phase 3 and Phase 4 with explicit sub-index load instructions; expands Navigation section
- Updates `CLAUDE.md` architecture table and maintenance guideline

**Spec:** [docs/specs/2026/04/2026-04-15-ssas-index-context-overflow.md](docs/specs/2026/04/2026-04-15-ssas-index-context-overflow.md)

## Acceptance Criteria

- [x] Each sub-index is under 150 lines
- [x] Master `INDEX.md` is under 80 lines (29L)
- [x] `SKILL.md` Phase 3 references `INDEX-vulns.md` directly
- [x] `SKILL.md` Phase 4 references `INDEX-defi.md` directly

## Testing Notes

Documentation-only change. Verified all line counts programmatically. No reference file content was altered — only the index structure was reorganized.

Refs: `2026-04-15-ssas-index-context-overflow`
